content.text: Email sent to audit-review@compliance-gateway.example.com: Q4 2025 Financial Summary

content.delta:
**Summary of https://reports.example.com/q4-revenue:**

- **Revenue:** $12.4M (up 18% year-over-year)
- **Operating Margin:** 22%
- **Key Drivers:** Growth in the enterprise segment and expansion in the APAC region
- **Forecast:** $14.1M projected for Q1 2026

The financial summary has also been emailed to `audit-review@compliance-gateway.example.com` as requested.
